hero.title: Travel That Hits Different
hero.subtitle: Small group adventures for 18-35s. Real experiences, real connections, real unforgettable moments.

products.title: Greek Island Hopping
products.desc: Sun-soaked days. Aegean nights. Island hop through Mykonos, Paros, Santorini and Ios.

itinerary.title: Arrive in Athens
itinerary.desc: Welcome to Greece! Meet your group and Trip Manager at the hotel. Tonight, a welcome dinner in the Plaka district with views of the Acropolis.

itinerary.title: Athens to Mykonos
itinerary.desc: Morning ferry to Mykonos. Explore the white-washed streets of Mykonos Town, visit Little Venice, and watch the sunset at the windmills.

itinerary.title: Mykonos Beach Day
itinerary.desc: Full day at Paradise Beach. Swim, sunbathe, and enjoy the beach party atmosphere. Optional visit to Delos Island ruins.

itinerary.title: Mykonos to Paros
itinerary.desc: Ferry to Paros. Explore Parikia town, visit the Church of 100 Doors, and enjoy a seafood dinner by the harbor.

itinerary.title: Paros Exploration
itinerary.desc: Explore Naoussa fishing village, rent a quad bike to explore hidden beaches, and try local wine tasting.

itinerary.title: Paros to Santorini
itinerary.desc: Ferry to the iconic Santorini. Check into your cave hotel in Oia. Watch the world's most famous sunset over the caldera.

itinerary.title: Santorini Volcano Tour
itinerary.desc: Boat tour to the volcanic islands. Swim in hot springs, hike the volcano, and enjoy a Greek BBQ on board.

itinerary.title: Santorini Free Day
itinerary.desc: Free day to explore Fira, visit the black sand beaches, or book a wine tour. Farewell dinner with the group tonight.

itinerary.title: Santorini to Ios
itinerary.desc: Ferry to Ios, the party island. Afternoon at Mylopotas Beach, evening out in Ios Town.

itinerary.title: Ios Beach & Party
itinerary.desc: Full day in Ios. Beach activities, water sports, and the legendary Ios nightlife.

itinerary.title: Depart Ios
itinerary.desc: Ferry back to Athens for departure. Say goodbye to your new friends and head home with unforgettable memories.

highlights: Island hop 4 Greek islands: Mykonos, Paros, Santorini & Ios
Watch the legendary Oia sunset in Santorini
Volcano tour with hot springs swim

products.title: Thai Island Hopper West
products.desc: Emerald bays. Andaman sunsets. Island hopping Thailand's west through Phuket, Phi Phi and Krabi.

products.title: Japan Express
products.desc: From Tokyo's neon streets to Kyoto's ancient temples. Bullet trains, sushi, and cherry blossoms.

products.title: Morocco Discovery
products.desc: Blue-walled Chefchaouen, Sahara camel treks, Marrakech souks. A sensory overload.

products.title: Italy Express
products.desc: Rome's ruins, Florence's art, Venice's canals, Amalfi's cliffs. La dolce vita in 9 days.

products.title: Peru Explorer
products.desc: Machu Picchu at sunrise, Sacred Valley treks, Lima food tours, Lake Titicaca homestays.

products.title: Jiangxi, Guizhou & Guangxi 22 Days
products.desc: A spectacular 22-day journey through Jiangxi, Guizhou, and Guangxi. Explore Taoist sacred mountains, picturesque villages, stunning karst landscapes, and vibrant ethnic cultures.

itinerary.title: Sydney – Guangzhou
itinerary.desc: Head to Sydney Kingsford Smith Airport early in the morning and check-in for your international flight to Nanchang via Guangzhou. Make sure you get 2 boarding passes for both connecting flights, and your checked luggage is transferred to Nanchang directly. Upon arrival at Guangzhou Baiyun International Airport T2, go through immigration first, then proceed to Domestic Arrival Hall on Ground Floor near Gate 50 for the China Southern Airlines Transit Counter. Confirm your transit hotel here and transfer to hotel via shuttle bus.

itinerary.title: Guangzhou - Nanchang
itinerary.desc: Enjoy a free and easy day in Guangzhou in the morning. Head back to Guangzhou Baiyun International Airport after lunch for your flight to Nanchang. Please arrive at Terminal 2 domestic departure before 14:10 and go for security check directly with the connecting flight boarding pass you get in Sydney, no need to check in again in Guangzhou. Upon arrival at Nanchang, meet your local guide and head to hotel in city centre.

itinerary.title: Nanchang – Yingtan
itinerary.desc: Day trip in Nanchang city, visit Tengwang Pavilion, Wanshou Palace Historical Block, Shengjin Tower and Bada Shanren Memorial Hall. Transit to Yingtan in the evening.

itinerary.title: Yingtan – Gexian Fairy Village
itinerary.desc: Visit Longhu Mountain (Dragon Tiger Mountain) Scenic Area in the morning. Check out the Shangqing Ancient Town and Tianshi Temple. Then transit to Gexian Fairy Village, a hidden sanctuary of Taoist culture. Explore the Lingbao Street where tradition, artistry and local flavours come together and enjoy the beautiful night view.

itinerary.title: Gexian Fairy Village – Wangxian Valley - Shangrao
itinerary.desc: Take cable car up to the Gexian Mountain in the morning, check out the Gexian Temple. Then transit to Wangxian Valley, take a walk along the Qingyun Bridge, Xunxian Path and the Three Bays waterfalls. After enjoying the night view of the valley, transit to Shangrao.

itinerary.title: Shangrao – Sanqing Mountain - Wuyuan
itinerary.desc: Take cable car up to the Sanqing Mountain, a famous Daoist sacred place. Check out the Nanqing Park, West Coast and Sunshine Coast on the mountain. Then transit to Wuyuan for the Wunvzhou Scenic Area.

itinerary.title: Wuyuan – Jingdezhen
itinerary.desc: Explore the Huangling Village in Wuyuan. Known for its terraced fields and picturesque village layout, Huangling is often referred to as 'Terraced Cloud Homes' due to its stunning scenery. Check out the Shuhe Mansion and the Heavenly Street for a taste of its history. Then transit to Jingdezhen, the world-famous porcelain capital with a history dating back to Northern Song Dynasty for over 1000 years. Take a walk along the Taoxichuan Ceramic Art Avenue in the evening.

itinerary.title: Jingdezhen
itinerary.desc: Enjoy a full day at Jingdezhen. Visit Jingdezhen China Ceramics Museum in the morning to learn about the rich history of ceramics here for more than two millennia. Check out Taoyang Alley Historical and Cultural Tourism Area in the afternoon. Explore the ancient kiln cluster, the archaeological site of the imperial kiln factory and the Imperial Kiln Museum and experience the charm of this intangible cultural heritage up close.

itinerary.title: Jingdezhen – Mt. Lu
itinerary.desc: Transit to Mt. Lu in the morning for a day trip on the mountain. Check out the Flower Path, Brocade Valley, Sky Bridge, Hanpo Pass, Meilu Villa and overlooking the Five Old Men Peaks.

itinerary.title: Mt. Lu – Nanchang - Guiyang
itinerary.desc: Coach transit back to Nanchang in the morning. Visit the ancient residential buildings of Wangshan Tuku built in the early years of Qing Dynasty. Take high speed train from Nanchang to Guiyang in the afternoon.

itinerary.title: Guiyang – Huangguoshu - Anshun
itinerary.desc: Visit Huangguoshu National Park today for a series of waterfalls with varied sizes and characteristics. Largest among all is Huangguoshu Waterfall, take shuttle bus and escalator to reach the Water-Curtain Cave inside the waterfall. Then check out the Yinlian Zhuitan Waterfall on the upper stream inside Tianxingqiao Scenic Area. Lastly, stop by the widest waterfall Doupotang Waterfall. Stay at hotel in Anshun tonight.

itinerary.title: Anshun - Guiyang
itinerary.desc: Take a boat ride into the Anshun Dragon Palace Cave in the morning. With its canyons, cliffs, streams and stone forests, it is one of the longest and most beautiful water caves in China. Return to Guiyang in the afternoon, check out some local icons including Jiaxiu Pavilion and Qingyun Market.

itinerary.title: Guiyang - Libo
itinerary.desc: Coach transit to Libo in the morning for the Xiaoqikong (Seven Small Arches) Scenic Area. The name originates from a seven-arch stone bridge that gracefully spans the Xiangshui River. This area seamlessly integrates mountains, water, forests, caves, lakes, and waterfalls, creating a picturesque and tranquil landscape. Take the shuttle bus and check out some of the must see spots including Wolong Pond, Cascade Waterfalls, Laya Waterfalls and Xiaoqikong Ancient Bridge.

itinerary.title: Libo – Xijiang
itinerary.desc: Visit Daqikong (Grand Seven Arches) Scenic Area in the morning for more karst canyons and natural bridges. Take boat trip and check out the Scary Valley and the Natural Bridge. Transit to Xijiang for the Thousand-household Miao Village, the largest village for Miao ethnic minority in China. Check out some iconic spots in the village including the Wooden Stilted Buildings, the Wind and Rain Bridges and the Miao Ethnic Minority Museum.

itinerary.title: Xijiang – Zhenyuan - Jiangkou
itinerary.desc: Visit Zhenyuan Ancient Town and Qinglong Cave (Green Dragon Cave) ancient building complex in the morning. This is the biggest complex in Guizhou Province, a magnificent place combines Confucianism, Taoism, Buddhism, Municipal House, bridge and traditional architectural culture. Transit to Jiangkou in the evening.

itinerary.title: Jiangkou – Mt. Fanjing - Guiyang
itinerary.desc: Explore the renowned Buddhist holy land Mt. Fanjing today. Take cable car up to the mountain top for the most famous Red Cloud Golden Summit and the Mushroom Rock. Return to Guiyang in the evening.

itinerary.title: Guiyang Departure (Option A) / Guiyang - Guilin (Option B)
itinerary.desc: Option A: Head to Guiyang Longdongbao International Airport after breakfast. Take international flight back to Sydney. Option B: Take high speed train from Guiyang to Guilin in the morning. Upon arrival at Guilin, take cable car up to the top of Mt. Yao, the highest mountain in Guilin downtown for stunning bird-view of Karst landscape in the city. Then visit the Seven Stars Park. In the evening, take a bus tour around the Two Rivers and Four Lakes in Guilin downtown.

itinerary.title: Guilin – Longji - Guilin (Option B)
itinerary.desc: A day trip to Longji (Dragon Backbone) Rice Terrace, a breathtaking agricultural wonder nestled in Guilin's remote mountainous region. Enjoy the overview of the largest terraced area Jinkeng Rice Terraces on cable car and overlooking the local Zhuang ethnic village. Return to Guilin downtown in the afternoon, take a walk around the Rong-shan Lake and the ancient South Gate for the beautiful night view.

itinerary.title: Guilin - Yangshuo (Option B)
itinerary.desc: Check out the local icons Xiangbi Hill (Elephant Trunk Hill) and Fobo Hill in Guilin in the morning. Coach transit to Yangshuo in the afternoon, visit the Shiwaitaoyuan (Land of Idyllic Beauty) Scenic Area developed based on the Peach Blossom Spring written by Tao Yuanming and the local landscape. Enjoy the renowned musical show Impression Liu Sanjie on the Li River about the Zhuang ethnic song fairy. At night, take a walk on the West Street for a taste of local night life.

itinerary.title: Yangshuo-Guilin (Option B)
itinerary.desc: Continue your trip in Yangshuo today. Take a river cruise along Li River, check out the Xingping ancient town for one of the best photographic locations in Guilin. Then explore the Silver Cave, the largest karst cave in the region. Also, enjoy the cormorant fishing practice for a taste of local fishermen's wisdom. Back to Guilin in the afternoon.

itinerary.title: Guilin – Nanning - Guangzhou (Option B)
itinerary.desc: Take high speed train from Yangshuo to Nanning in the morning, then transit to Nanning Wuxu International Airport for your flight to Guangzhou. When check in, please make sure you get 2 boarding passes for both connecting flights, and your checked luggage is transferred to Sydney directly. Upon arrival at Guangzhou Baiyun International Airport T2, proceed to Domestic Arrival Hall on Ground Floor near Gate 50 for the China Southern Airlines Transit Counter. Confirm your transit hotel here and transfer to hotel via shuttle bus.

itinerary.title: Guangzhou - Sydney (Option B)
itinerary.desc: Head back to Guangzhou Baiyun International Airport in the early morning by hotel shuttle bus. Please arrive at Terminal 2 International Departure before 6:00am. Proceed to immigration and security check directly with the connecting flight boarding pass you get in Nanning the day before, no need to check in again in Guangzhou. Take your flight back to Sydney.

highlights: Visit Taoist sacred mountains (Gexian Mountain, Mt. Lu)
Discover stunning karst landscapes (Mt. Fanjing, Xiaoqikong)
included: International and domestic flights with tax
All entrance fees shown in itinerary
Cable car and shuttle bus where mentioned
notIncluded: Tips for guide and driver (AUD 250/person, pay before departure)

products.title: Austria, Czech, Hungary, Slovakia & Germany Discovery
products.desc: A magnificent journey through 5 European countries. Explore imperial cities, medieval towns, fairy-tale castles, and the stunning Rhine River valley.

itinerary.title: Day 1
itinerary.desc: 31st Aug (Mon)   悉尼 – 廣州   Sydney - Guangzhou 上午自行前往悉尼國際機場辦理值機，搭乘中國南方航空航班經中國廣州前往德國法蘭克福。值機時，請同時領取2段聯程航班的登機牌，托運行李將直接抵達法蘭克福，在廣州中轉時無需領取。抵達廣州、辦理海關入境手續后，請直接前往本航站樓（T2）國内到達出口一樓50號門附近的南航中轉住宿櫃檯，辦理轉機酒店手續，並乘坐南航提供的接駁車前往轉機酒店休息。 *中國入境表格中，酒店地址一欄請填寫：廣州南航明珠大酒店。 Head to Sydney Kingsford Smith Airport early in the morning and check-in for your international flight to Frankfurt, Germany via Guangzhou, China. Make sure you get 2 boarding passes for both connecting flights, and your checked in luggage is transferred t

itinerary.title: Day 2
itinerary.desc: 1st Sep (Tue)   廣州 – 法蘭克福   Guangzhou - Frankfurt 今日于廣州自由活動，傍晚返回廣州白雲機場。請于晚上9:50前抵達機場，憑昨日領取的聯程航班登機牌直接過安檢及海關出境手續，無需再次辦理值機。安檢后，請于機場大屏再次確認前往德國法蘭克福的航班登機閘口。 Enjoy your free day in Guangzhou today and return to Guangzhou Baiyun International Airport Terminal 2 in the evening. Please arrive at the airport before 9:50pm and go for security check/immigration directly with the connecting flight boarding pass you get in Sydney, no need to check in again in Guangzhou. Please refer to the airport screens and

itinerary.title: Day 3
itinerary.desc: 2nd Sep (Wed)   法蘭克福   Frankfurt 行程 Itinerary：抵達法蘭克福，導遊接機。開始城市觀光。 Arrive in Frankfurt, meet your guide. Begin city sightseeing. 景點介紹 Attractions： 法蘭克福大教堂 (外觀) / Frankfurt Cathedral (Exterior)： 擁有600年歷史的皇帝加冕教堂，是法蘭克福的標誌性建築。 A 600-year-old imperial coronation church and a landmark of Frankfurt. 法蘭克福舊市政廳 (外觀) Römer (Old Town Hall, Exterior)： 位於羅馬貝格廣場，由三座精美的連體哥特式樓房構成，是城市的象徵。 Located on Römerberg square, consisting of three beautifully connected Gothic buildings, it is a symbol of the city. 鐵橋 (外觀) Ei

itinerary.title: Day 4
itinerary.desc: 3rd Sep (Thu)   法蘭克福 – 呂德斯海姆 – 科佈倫茨 – 法蘭克福 Frankfurt – Rüdesheim – Koblenz – Frankfurt 行程  Itinerary： 全天遊覽萊茵河精華段。Full-day exploration of the Rhine River's most beautiful section. 上午前往「萊茵河珍珠」呂德斯海姆，漫步畫眉鳥小巷。Morning visit to Rüdesheim, the "Pearl of the Rhine", and a stroll down Drosselgasse lane. 下午搭乘萊茵河遊船，欣賞兩岸風光與蘿蕾萊岩石。之後前往科布倫茨，參觀兩河交匯處的德意志之角。 Afternoon Rhine River cruise, enjoying the scenery and the Lorelei Rock. Then proceed to Koblenz to see the Deutsches Eck (German Corner) at the confluence of

itinerary.title: Day 5
itinerary.desc: 4th Sep (Fri)   法蘭克福 – 海德堡 – 羅騰堡 – 斯圖加特 Frankfurt – Heidelberg – Rothenburg – Stuttgart 行程 Itinerary： 上午遊覽大學城海德堡，參觀海德堡老橋、海德堡大學廣場及遠觀山上的海德堡城堡。下午前往被譽為「中世紀之珠」的羅騰堡，遊覽市政廳、步雲萊和市集廣場。傍晚抵達汽車之城斯圖加特。 Morning visit to the university town of Heidelberg, seeing the Old Bridge, University Square, and viewing the Heidelberg Castle from afar. Afternoon trip to Rothenburg ob der Tauber, known as the "Medieval Pearl", visiting the Town Hall, Plönlein, and Market Square. Evening arrival in Stuttgart, the city of aut

itinerary.title: Day 6
itinerary.desc: 5th Sep (Sat)   斯圖加特 – 新天鵝堡 – 慕尼黑 Stuttgart – Neuschwanstein Castle - Munich 行程 Itinerary： 上午驅車前往童話城堡——新天鵝堡入內參觀（如遇流量管制可能調整）。下午前往巴伐利亞首府慕尼黑。 Morning drive to the fairy-tale Neuschwanstein Castle for an interior visit (subject to change due to crowd control). Afternoon travel to Munich, the capital of Bavaria. 車程 Driving Distance： 約313公里。 Approximately 313 km. 住宿 Accommodation： 慕尼黑或周邊酒店。 Hotel in or around Munich. 餐飲 Meals： 早、午餐。 Breakfast, Lunch.

itinerary.title: Day 7
itinerary.desc: 6th Sep (Sun)   慕尼黑 – 皮爾森 – 布拉格 Munich - Plzen - Prague 行程 Itinerary： 上午遊覽慕尼黑，參觀瑪利亞廣場、新市政廳及皇家啤酒館外觀。之後乘車途徑皮爾森小鎮，前往捷克首都布拉格。 Morning sightseeing in Munich, visiting Marienplatz, the New Town Hall, and the exterior of the Hofbräuhaus. Later, head to Prague, the capital of the Czech Republic by bus, and stop by the lovely town of Plzen on the way. 車程 Driving Distance： 約391公里。 Approximately 391 km. 住宿 Accommodation： 布拉格酒店。 Hotel in Prague. 餐飲 Meals： 早、晚餐。 Breakfast, Dinner.

itinerary.title: Day 8
itinerary.desc: 7th Sep (Mon)   布拉格深度游   Prague In-Depth Tour I 行程 Itinerary： 全天遊覽布拉格。 Full-day tour of Prague. 上午參觀布拉格城堡區，入內參觀聖維特大教堂和有趣的黃金巷。 Morning visit to Prague Castle complex, entering St. Vitus Cathedral and the interesting Golden Lane. 下午遊覽老城廣場，觀看天文鐘整點報時，並漫步穿越著名的查理大橋。 Afternoon exploration of Old Town Square, watching the Astronomical Clock chime on the hour, and walking across the famous Charles Bridge. 住宿 Accommodation： 布拉格酒店。 Hotel in Prague. 餐飲 Meals： 早、晚餐。 / Breakfast, Dinner.

itinerary.title: Day 9
itinerary.desc: 8th Sep (Tue)   布拉格深度游   Prague In-Depth Tour II 行程 Itinerary： 全天遊覽布拉格。 Full-day tour of Prague. 上午探索布拉格猶太區，參觀老猶太會堂和博物館。Morning exploration of Prague's Jewish Quarter, visiting the Old-New Synagogue and museums. 下午在瓦茨拉夫廣場及伏爾塔瓦河畔自由活動，享受購物與休閒時光。 Afternoon free time at Wenceslas Square and along the Vltava River for shopping and leisure. 住宿 Accommodation： 布拉格酒店。 Hotel in Prague. 餐飲 Meals： 早、午餐。 Breakfast, Lunch.

itinerary.title: Day 10
itinerary.desc: 9th Sep (Wed)   布拉格 – 克魯姆洛夫（CK小鎮）– 布傑約維採 (百威小鎮) Prague - Český Krumlov (CK Town) - České Budějovice (Budweis Town) 行程 Itinerary： 上午前往世界文化遺產克魯姆洛夫 (CK小鎮)，欣賞伏爾塔瓦河環繞的迷人景致，遠觀克魯姆洛夫城堡。下午抵達啤酒之鄉布傑約維採 (百威小鎮)。 Morning trip to the UNESCO World Heritage site Český Krumlov (CK Town), admiring the charming scenery surrounded by the Vltava River and viewing Český Krumlov Castle from outside. Afternoon arrival in České Budějovice (Budweis Town), the home of beer. 車程 Driving Distance： 約190公里。 Approximately 190 km

itinerary.title: Day 11
itinerary.desc: 10th Sep (Thu)   布傑約維採 (百威小鎮) – 哈爾施塔特 – 湖區小鎮 České Budějovice (Budweis Town) – Hallstatt – Lake District Town 行程 Itinerary： 上午在百威小鎮參觀百威啤酒廠。隨後前往奧地利，遊覽被譽為「世界最美小鎮」的哈爾施塔特。傍晚入住湖區小鎮。 Morning visit to the Budweiser Budvar Brewery in Budweis. Then travel to Austria to visit Hallstatt, renowned as one of the world's most beautiful towns. Evening check-in at a town in the Lake District. 車程 Driving Distance： 約204公里。 Approximately 204 km. 住宿 Accommodation： 薩爾茨卡默古特湖區小鎮酒店。 Hotel in a town in the Salzkammergut

itinerary.title: Day 12
itinerary.desc: 11th  Sep (Fri)   湖區小鎮 – 聖沃爾夫岡 – 薩爾斯堡 Lake District Town – St. Wolfgang - Salzburg 行程 Itinerary： 上午前往聖沃爾夫岡湖濱小鎮，體驗著名的沙夫山蒸汽火車，欣賞七湖全景。下午途徑月亮湖，隨後抵達音樂之聲的故鄉——薩爾茨堡。 Morning visit to the lakeside town of St. Wolfgang, experiencing the famous Schafbergbahn cog railway for panoramic views of seven lakes. Afternoon stop at Mondsee (Moon Lake), then arrival in Salzburg, the setting of The Sound of Music. 車程 Driving Distance： 約140公里。 Approximately 140 km. 住宿 Accommodation： 薩爾茨堡酒店。 Hotel in Salzburg. 餐飲 Meals

itinerary.title: Day 13
itinerary.desc: 12th Sep (Sat)   薩爾斯堡 – 哈萊因鹽礦 - 國王湖 - 湖區小鎮 Salzburg - Hallein Salt Mine - Königssee - Lake District Town 行程 Itinerary： 上午參觀古老的哈萊因鹽礦，體驗礦工滑梯。下午前往德國，遊覽如仙境般的國王湖（乘船遊覽）。傍晚返回奧地利湖區小鎮入住。 Morning visit to the ancient Hallein Salt Mine, experiencing the miner's slide. Afternoon trip to Germany to visit the fairy-tale-like Königssee (King's Lake, boat tour included). Evening return to a town in the Austrian Lake District. 車程 Driving Distance： 約58公里。 Approximately 58 km. 住宿 Accommodation： 薩爾茨卡默古特湖區小鎮酒店。 Hote

itinerary.title: Day 14
itinerary.desc: 13th Sep (Sun)   湖區小鎮 - 瓦豪河谷 - 維也納 Lake District Town - Wachau Valley - Vienna 行程 Itinerary： 全天遊覽世界文化遺產瓦豪河谷。上午參觀梅爾克修道院。隨後在梅爾克搭乘瓦豪河谷遊船，順流而下，欣賞葡萄園、古堡與小鎮風光，在杜恩斯坦下船觀光。之後驅車前往音樂之都維也納。 Full-day tour of the UNESCO World Heritage Wachau Valley. Morning visit to Melk Abbey. Then take a Wachau Valley cruise from Melk, sailing past vineyards, castles, and picturesque towns, disembarking at Dürnstein for sightseeing. Afterwards, drive to the music capital, Vienna. 車程 Driving Distance： 約307公里。 Approximately 3

itinerary.title: Day 15
itinerary.desc: 14th Sep (Mon)   維也納深度游   Vienna In-Depth Tour 行程 Itinerary： 全天遊覽維也納。參觀城市公園內的施特勞斯雕像，外觀金色大廳和國家歌劇院。遊覽市中心的聖史蒂芬大教堂，並參觀充滿藝術想像的百水公寓。 Full-day sightseeing in Vienna. Visit Stadtpark (City Park) to see the Johann Strauss Monument. View the exterior of the Musikverein (Golden Hall) and the Vienna State Opera. Explore the central St. Stephen's Cathedral and visit the imaginative Hundertwasserhaus. 住宿 Accommodation： 維也納酒店。 Hotel in Vienna. 餐飲 Meals： 早、晚餐。 Breakfast, Dinner.

itinerary.title: Day 16
itinerary.desc: 15th Sep (Tue)   維也納 – 布拉迪斯拉發（斯洛伐克） Vienna – Bratislava (Slovakia) 行程 Itinerary： 上午參觀維也納的象徵——美泉宮及後花園（含講解）。下午前往斯洛伐克首都布拉迪斯拉發，遊覽老城區、大廣場、聖馬丁教堂，遠觀布拉迪斯拉發城堡和現代感十足的懸索大橋（飛碟橋）。 Morning visit to the symbol of Vienna, Schönbrunn Palace and its gardens (with audio guide). Afternoon drive to Bratislava, the capital of Slovakia. Explore the Old Town, Main Square, St. Martin's Cathedral, and view Bratislava Castle and the modern UFO Bridge from a distance. 車程 Driving Distance： 約80公里。 Approximately 80 km. 住宿 Acc

itinerary.title: Day 17
itinerary.desc: 16th Sep (Wed)   布拉迪斯拉發（斯洛伐克）– 布达佩斯（匈牙利） Bratislava (Slovakia) – Budapest (Hungary) 行程 Itinerary： 上午驅車前往「多瑙河明珠」布達佩斯。下午開始城市觀光：參觀英雄廣場和城市公園，外觀宏偉的國會大廈和聖伊斯特萬大教堂。 Morning drive to Budapest, the "Pearl of the Danube". Begin afternoon city sightseeing: visit Heroes' Square and City Park, and view the magnificent Hungarian Parliament Building and St. Stephen's Basilica from outside. 車程 Driving Distance： 約200公里。 Approximately 200 km. 住宿 Accommodation： 布達佩斯酒店。 Hotel in Budapest. 餐飲 Meals： 早、晚餐。 Breakfast,

itinerary.title: Day 18
itinerary.desc: 17th Sep (Thu)   布达佩斯深度游   Budapest In-Depth Tour 行程 Itinerary： 全天遊覽布達佩斯。Full-day tour of Budapest. 上午登上漁人堡，俯瞰多瑙河與佩斯城全景，外觀馬加什教堂。Morning visit to Fisherman's Bastion for panoramic views of the Danube and Pest, and view Matthias Church from outside. 下午體驗多瑙河日間遊船，從河上欣賞兩岸風光，之後自由活動。Afternoon Daytime Danube River cruise to admire the cityscape from the water. Free time afterwards. 住宿 Accommodation： 布達佩斯酒店。 Hotel in Budapest. 餐飲 Meals： 早、午餐。 Breakfast, Lunch.

itinerary.title: Day 19
itinerary.desc: 18th Sep (Fri)   布达佩斯 – 多瑙河三小镇 – 布达佩斯 Budapest – Danube Bend Towns - Budapest 行程 Itinerary： 全天遊覽多瑙河灣三小鎮。Full-day excursion to three towns along the Danube Bend. 依次參觀：埃斯泰爾戈姆（參觀宏偉的聖母升天大教堂）、維謝格拉德（遠觀雲中城堡）、聖安德烈（藝術小鎮，自由漫步）。傍晚返回布達佩斯。 Visit in order: Esztergom (visit the grand Basilica of St. Adalbert), Visegrád (view the hilltop castle from afar), and Szentendre (artistic town, free stroll). Return to Budapest in the evening. 車程 Driving Distance： 總環線約133公里。 Total loop approximately 133 km. 住宿 Accommoda

itinerary.title: Day 20
itinerary.desc: 19th Sep (Sat)   布达佩斯離開   Departing Budapest 早餐後前往布達佩斯機場，結束本次大城小鎮深度游。請根據您實際航班行程，經北京首都轉機前往香港、或直接返回廣州。感謝選擇Voya Travel！ Head to Budapest International Airport after breakfast. Please check in your flight according to your booking (either to Hong Kong via Beijing or to Guangzhou directly). Thank you for choosing Voya Travel! CA720   布達佩斯Budapest/BUD (T2B) – 北京首都Beijing Capital/PEK (T3)   [19/Sep] 13:00 – 04:10 (+1) CA101   北京首都Beijing Capital/PEK (T3) – 香港Hong Kong/HKG (T1)   [20/Sep] 08:05 – 11:50

highlights: Explore medieval towns and fairy-tale castles

products.title: Guizhou & Yunnan Panorama 17 Days
products.desc: A 17-day deep exploration of Guizhou and Yunnan. Discover mystical karst caves, ethnic cultures, towering peaks, and mirror-like lakes.

itinerary.title: Sydney – Guangzhou - Guiyang
itinerary.desc: Head to Sydney Kingsford Smith Airport early in the morning and check-in for your international flight to Guiyang via Guangzhou. Make sure you get 2 boarding passes for both connecting flights, and your checked in luggage is transferred to Guiyang directly. Meet your local guide at Guiyang airport upon arrival and transfer to hotel.

itinerary.title: Guiyang - Libo
itinerary.desc: Bus transit from Guiyang to Libo (~3.5hr) in the morning. Visit Xiaoqikong (Small Seven Arches) Scenic Area in the afternoon. Known as 'The Green Gem on Earth's Belt', it integrates caves, forests, lakes, waterfalls, and streams. Highlights include the ancient Seven-Arch Bridge, the cliff-side Laya Waterfall, the cascading 68-tier Dropping Waterfall, the walkable Watery Forest, and the mirror-like Wolongtan (Crouching Dragon Pool).

itinerary.title: Libo – Guiyang
itinerary.desc: Visit Daqikong (Big Seven Arches) Scenic Area in the morning. Famous for its majestic gorge. Take a boat through the towering Terror Gorge to see the massive natural karst Natural Bridge. Return to Guiyang in the afternoon (~4hr), then visit local icons including Jiaxiu Tower and Qingyun Market in the evening. Jiaxiu Tower is a Ming Dynasty landmark pavilion built on a rock in the Nanming River, beautiful at night. Qingyun Market is a vibrant cultural and leisure block with local food and trendy shops.

itinerary.title: Guiyang - Zhijin Cave - Anshun
itinerary.desc: Coach ride to Zhijin Cave (~2.5hrs) in the morning. Known as 'The King of Chinese Karst Caves', a vast underground palace with spectacular stalactite formations. Then proceed to Anshun. Visit Anshun Ancient Town in the evening. It is a historic area preserving old flagstone streets and residences from the Ming and Qing dynasties.

itinerary.title: Anshun - Xingyi
itinerary.desc: Visit Dragon Palace and Tianlong Tunpu in the morning. Dragon Palace features water caves, dry caves, and waterfalls. A boat ride through the underground river offers stunning views. Tianlong Tunpu is a well-preserved Ming Dynasty military garrison settlement where descendants still wear traditional attire. Coach ride to Xingyi (~4hrs), passing by Huajiang Grand Canyon Bridge en route. The bridge is a magnificent modern bridge spanning a deep gorge (viewed from service area).

itinerary.title: Xingyi Day Tour
itinerary.desc: Visit Maling River Gorge in the morning. Known as 'The Most Beautiful Scar on Earth', numerous waterfalls cascade down the deep gorge walls. Explore Wanfenglin (Ten Thousand Peak Forest) and enjoy themed afternoon tea in the afternoon. Praised by Xu Xiake, thousands of karst peaks rise above idyllic farmland and villages.

itinerary.title: Xingyi - Wanfeng Lake
itinerary.desc: Wanfeng Lake cruise in the morning. A vast lake dotted with islands, surrounded by countless peaks. Visit Fenglin Buyi Scenic Area and watch cultural performances in the afternoon. Experience Buyi ethnic culture and watch regular folk performances.

itinerary.title: Xingyi - Kunming
itinerary.desc: Coach ride to Kunming (~4.5hr). Free time upon arrival. Kunming, known as the 'Spring City', offers pleasant weather year-round. Explore the city at your leisure.

itinerary.title: Kunming - Pu'er (By Bullet Train)
itinerary.desc: Take bullet train from Kunming to Pu'er. Visit China Pu'er Tea Expo Garden in the afternoon. A theme park showcasing Pu'er tea history, cultivation, and culture. Enjoy panoramic views of tea plantations.

itinerary.title: Pu'er – Xishuangbanna
itinerary.desc: Visit Pu'er National Forest Park in the morning. A sanctuary for wildlife like red pandas and rhinos. Walk through pristine forest trails. Coach ride to Xishuangbanna and visit Wild Elephant Valley in the afternoon. The best place in China to potentially observe wild Asian elephants (from a safe cable car or walkway).

itinerary.title: Xishuangbanna Day Tour
itinerary.desc: Visit China-Myanmar Border and Menghai Ancient Tea Horse Road in the morning. Visit Menglun Tropical Botanical Garden and Dai Ethnic Garden in the afternoon. Menglun Tropical Botanical Garden (CAS) is China's largest botanical garden, a microcosm of the 'Kingdom of Plants'. Dai Ethnic Garden consists of five authentic Dai villages. Participate in or watch the grand daily Water-Splashing Festival activity.

itinerary.title: Xishuangbanna - Mangshi (By Flight)
itinerary.desc: Visit Primitive Forest Park in the morning. Watch ethnic song & dance performances and the spectacular peacock. Visit Mengle Great Buddha Temple and Manjing Park in the afternoon. Mengle Great Buddha Temple is a grand Southeast Asian style Buddhist temple overlooking Jinghong. Manjing Park is the former royal garden of the Dai King, with beautiful landscapes. Evening flight to Mangshi.

itinerary.title: Mangshi - Ruili
itinerary.desc: Visit MengHuan Grand Golden Pagoda and Pagoda Wrapped by Tree in Mangshi. The Golden Pagoda is the landmark of Mangshi. The Pagoda Wrapped by Tree is a wonder where a banyan tree has grown around and enveloped a pagoda. Coach ride to Ruili, check out the Single Tree Forest en route. Single Tree Forest is a single large banyan tree whose aerial roots have formed a small forest.

itinerary.title: Ruili - Tengchong
itinerary.desc: Visit One Village Two Countries, Ruili Chief Buddhist Temple and Jiegao Port in the morning. One Village Two Countries is a unique village split by the China-Myanmar border. Jiegao Port is an important national-level border trade port. Then visit Moli Waterfall before coach ride to Tengchong. Moli Waterfall is a scenic waterfall hidden in tropical rainforest.

itinerary.title: Tengchong Day Tour
itinerary.desc: Visit Simola Wa Village and Rehai (Hot Sea) Geothermal Park in the morning. Simola Wa Village is a picturesque, primitive Wa ethnic village meaning 'the place of happiness'. Rehai Geothermal Park is the core area of Tengchong's geothermal wonders, featuring boiling springs like the Big Boiling Pot. Visit Volcanic Geopark and Heshun Ancient Town in the afternoon. Volcanic Geopark offers ancient volcanic craters. Hot air balloon rides available (optional). Heshun Ancient Town is a famous, tranquil hometown of overseas Chinese with rich history and well-preserved architecture.

itinerary.title: Tengchong - Baoshan - Kunming (By Bullet Train)
itinerary.desc: Visit Dadi Tea Plantation in the morning. Vast ecological tea plantation offering tea tasting and experiences. Coach ride to Baoshan then take bullet train back to Kunming. Kunming, the 'Spring City', welcomes you back.

itinerary.title: Depart from Kunming
itinerary.desc: Enjoy your free and easy time before heading to Kunming airport for departure. Thank you for choosing Voya Travel! Please refer to your ticket for flight details.

about.heroSubtitle: Since 2010, we've helped over 50,000 young travelers discover the world in a way that's authentic, affordable, and unforgettable.
storyText: Voya Travel started with a simple idea: travel should be about real experiences, not just ticking off tourist traps. What began as a handful of friends organizing trips has grown into a global community of young adventurers.

Today, we run trips across 60+ countries, but our mission hasn't changed. We believe the best travel moments happen when you step outside your comfort zone, connect with locals, and share the journey with like-minded people.
missionText: To create travel experiences that are authentic, sustainable, and accessible to everyone aged 18-35. We're not just selling trips - we're creating the stories you'll tell for the rest of your life.
Every itinerary is designed by people who've been there. Every guide is a local who calls the destination home. Every group is small enough to feel like friends, big enough to feel like a party.

values.title: Authentic Experiences
values.desc: No tourist traps. We take you where the locals go, eat what the locals eat, and live like the locals live.

values.title: Sustainable Travel
values.desc: We offset our carbon footprint, support local businesses, and leave every place better than we found it.

values.title: Community First
values.desc: Small groups, real connections. You'll leave with 15 new friends from 10 different countries.
